name: io.github.corewebvitals/coredash
description: Real User Monitoring for Core Web Vitals. Query LCP, INP, CLS field data from real visitors.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token in the format 'Bearer cdk_YOUR_API_KEY'. Generate a key at https://coredash.app/settings/api. OAuth is also supported via WWW-Authenticate discovery.
